Container.Name: ArgusFlix-Manager
Container.Overview: ArgusFlix Manager is a central control panel for the ArgusFlix Android TV ecosystem. It handles stream validation, EPG management, live layout syncing, user profiles, and PIN protections for your IPTV ecosystem.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: The main port used to access the ArgusFlix Manager Dashboard and API.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage location for SQLite database, static files, and media.

Config.Name: Secret Key
Config.Description: Django Secret Key. Must be a secure random string (e.g. 50 characters). If left blank, it will be automatically generated, but setting it explicitly is recommended so it doesn't change on rebuilds.

Config.Name: Allowed Hosts
Config.Description: Comma separated list of allowed hosts (e.g., 192.168.1.100,argusflix.local). Use * for any host.

Config.Name: Debug Mode
Config.Description: Enable debug mode (True/False). Only use for troubleshooting.

Config.Name: Database Connection
Config.Description: URL for the database. By default uses local SQLite. Can be changed to Postgres (postgres://user:password@host:5432/dbname)

Config.Name: Redis Connection
Config.Description: URL for the Redis cache/broker. You will need a separate Redis container running.
